summary: Refactoring Phase 2 - Testing extracted quote components. All 4 extracted components (QuoteCard, RevisionHistoryModal, ApprovalSuccessModal, RejectReasonModal) are properly integrated into quotes.tsx. File reduced from 5113 to 4747 lines (~366 lines reduction). Tab navigation shows 'Products' instead of 'Calculator'.

issues: Console warnings: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - whitespace issue between JSX elements, non-critical

seed_data_creation: Used existing quotes/RFQs from prior testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring phase 2 complete. 4 components extracted from monolithic quotes.tsx (5113 lines -> 4747 lines). All components working correctly: QuoteCard renders quote list items, RevisionHistoryModal shows revision history for approved quotes, ApprovalSuccessModal shows after RFQ approval, RejectReasonModal shows when rejecting RFQ. Tab navigation updated to show 'Products' instead of 'Calculator'.
